hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.name: Fidel Pérez Casado
hero.subtitle: Creating exceptional digital experiences with clean code and innovative solutions

about.title: About Me
about.bio_1: I am a Full Stack Developer passionate about building modern and efficient web applications. With experience in both frontend and backend technologies, I specialize in building complete solutions that not only work well but also deliver exceptional user experiences.
about.bio_2: My approach focuses on writing clean, maintainable, and scalable code, always seeking to learn new technologies and improve my skills. I enjoy working in teams and contributing to projects that generate a positive impact.
about.feature_1_desc: Development with industry best practices and standards
about.feature_2_desc: Applications optimized for speed and scalability
about.feature_3_desc: Creative approach to solving complex problems

items.description: Development and maintenance of scalable web applications for international clients. Technical leadership on projects using React, Node.js and PostgreSQL.
achievements: 40% reduction in initial render times through lazy loading strategies and database query restructuring
Design and deployment of a distributed microservices architecture, orchestrated with Docker and automated CI/CD pipelines on AWS cloud
Creation of a robust authorization layer with OAuth2 flows, incorporating granular role and user privilege management
Mentoring and supervision of 2 junior developers, accelerating their integration curve and code best practices

items.description: Development of modern user interfaces and functional validation for enterprise applications. Close collaboration with product and UX teams to ensure design fidelity and technical robustness.
achievements: Implementation of complex views and interaction logic using React JS, JavaScript (ES6) and advanced CSS for responsive layouts
Consumption and management of data from REST APIs built on Django and PostgreSQL database
Early validation of acceptance criteria and execution of exploratory/regression testing to ensure bug-free production deployments
Key participation in Dailies and Retrospectives to align frontend development with sprint goals and backend architecture

items.description: Development of websites and applications for small and medium businesses. Complete project management from conceptualization to deployment.
achievements: Built and delivered over 10 web portals tailored to the specific needs of various business sectors
Integration of online sales functionality through configuration and deployment of e-commerce platforms with secure payment gateways
Administration and optimization of hosting environments on Virtual Private Servers (VPS), including Nginx web server configuration and SSL certificate installation
Design and implementation of robust REST APIs using Node.js with the Express framework
